tasks.subject: M2a Task 1: build_run_context + attacker injection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract run_campaign setup into build_run_context; run_campaign accepts a pre-built attacker.

**Files:** engine.py (RunContext, build_run_context, run_campaign attacker=), models.py (CampaignConfig.attacker_path), tests/test_run_context.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- build_run_context -> RunContext(attacker_lm, judge_lm, report_judge_lm, opt_judge, target, risks, strategies)
- run_campaign(attacker=) injection; unchanged when None
- CampaignConfig.attacker_path

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_run_context.py tests/test_engine.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/engine.py", "src/greycloak/models.py", "tests/test_run_context.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_run_context.py tests/test_engine.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build_run_context populated", "attacker injection", "attacker_path field"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: M2a Task 2: attacker persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** save/load compiled AttackGenerator (DSPy .save/.load); run_campaign honors attacker_path.

**Files:** store.py (save_attacker/load_attacker), engine.py (attacker_path load), tests/test_attacker_store.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- save_attacker/load_attacker roundtrip forwards under DummyLM
- run_campaign loads config.attacker_path when no attacker passed

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_attacker_store.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/store.py", "src/greycloak/engine.py", "tests/test_attacker_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_attacker_store.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["save/load roundtrip", "attacker_path loaded"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: M2a Task 3: Direct baseline + measure_asr
tasks.description:
**Goal:** No-LM Direct baseline + measure_asr over (risk,strategy) pairs + deterministic split_pairs.

**Files:** baselines.py (DirectBaseline), optimize.py (split_pairs, build_examples_for_pairs, measure_asr), tests/test_baselines.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- DirectBaseline no-LM plain probe
- measure_asr -> {asr, mean_divergence, n}
- split_pairs deterministic, disjoint

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_baselines.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/baselines.py", "src/greycloak/optimize.py", "tests/test_baselines.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_baselines.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DirectBaseline no-LM", "measure_asr counts", "split_pairs deterministic"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: M2a Task 4: optimize driver + CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** run_optimization (compile vs J_opt on train; report Direct/baseline/compiled ASR on eval via J_rep, mean±stdev over seeds, J_opt/J_rep gap, save attacker); greycloak optimize CLI + example.

**Files:** optimize.py (OptimizationResult, run_optimization), cli.py (optimize), examples/optimize.py, tests/test_optimize_driver.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- run_optimization -> OptimizationResult arms {direct,baseline,compiled} + opt_rep_gap + attacker_id
- compiled vs J_opt; reported ASR vs J_rep
- optimize CLI prints comparison

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_optimize_driver.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/greycloak/optimize.py", "src/greycloak/cli.py", "examples/optimize.py", "tests/test_optimize_driver.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_optimize_driver.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["arms with mean+stdev", "compiled vs J_opt reported vs J_rep", "optimize CLI"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
